tickets.title: vault-critic AG hang — network theory REFUTED by 6/04 probe; hang is INSIDE gemini's request path, not the network. The 6/04 03:30 run fired the IP-family probe AT the 120s-timeout moment: BOTH Google hosts (cloudcode-pa + play.googleapis) connected in ~15-26ms on IPv4 AND IPv6, and the api.openai.com control connected too — i.e. the network was fully up while gemini's authenticated model request hung to 120s and returned 0 tokens. The 6/03 play.googleapis.com connect-timeouts were a red herring (telemetry endpoint, intermittent; the actual model host cloudcode-pa was reachable). So eliminated now: MCP, OAuth-refresh, machine-asleep, AND raw network reachability. What remains is the authenticated Code Assist streaming call silently hanging (server-side throttle-as-hang on the preview model, or a CLI stream bug) — but note: curl-reachable ≠ authed-call-works, and the CLI swallows the real error, so further --debug captures won't reveal more. RECOMMENDATION: stop chasing the gemini hang — the circuit breaker now contains it ($0 impact) and the June-18 oauth EOL obsoletes the whole path. Collapse this into the migration decision below

tickets.title: last30days X/Twitter broken by incomplete vendored dep — `.claude/skills/last30days/scripts/lib/vendor/bird-search/node_modules/@steipete/sweet-cookie/` shipped with only package.json+README+LICENSE; its `dist/` (the actual code) was never vendored, so every X search crashed with `ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND` regardless of auth. FROM_BROWSER=auto silently failed for the same reason. 2026-06-08 hotfix: pulled `dist/` from `npm pack @steipete/sweet-cookie@0.1.0` and dropped it into the vendored folder (verified — X returned 19 posts). FOLLOW-UPS: (1) [DONE 2026-06-08] ran `sync.sh` — dist/ propagated to ~/.claude / ~/.agents / ~/.codex, all 3 import-check OK + module resolves; (2) [MOOT] can't commit — `node_modules/` is gitignored in code-brain (.gitignore:40), so the fix is local-only and won't survive a fresh clone or `npm` clean; sync.sh re-propagates from the source copy, but the dist/ in the SOURCE copy is itself gitignored — so a fresh code-brain clone reintroduces the bug. PERMANENT FIX is upstream only; (3) [OPEN] report upstream to mvanhorn/last30days-skill — published skill vendors @steipete/sweet-cookie without its dist/ (external action, needs Sean). Also: AUTH_TOKEN/CT0 now persisted in ~/.config/last30days/.env (X session cookies, will expire)
